description_long: This is a modern, expansive residential house complex featuring a central main building surrounded by landscaped grounds, a large rectangular swimming pool, and several outdoor amenities. The main structure is characterized by clean lines, flat roofs, and large windows, giving it a contemporary architectural style. The property includes paved walkways connecting the main house to a pool area, a circular patio, and a separate utility or storage structure. Decorative trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the property, enhancing its aesthetic appeal. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with glass elements for the windows. The overall layout suggests a luxurious, open-plan living environment with significant outdoor recreational space.
description: A modern, multi-structure house complex with flat roofs, large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped grounds. The design features clean lines, paved walkways, and decorative trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house facade, entry walkway, two decorative trees, and the pool area behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, a circular patio, and the arrangement of outbuildings and landscaping elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool as the central feature, with the main house and utility structures in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house, pool, and a clear view of the utility structure and sandy area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a wide walkway, flanked by decorative trees, and a minimalistic door design without porch or columns
